nodes.label: Deep Dive: Real-Time Tick Data & Factor Computation Flow
Critical Path to Working Real-Time Factors
Subscribe to AAPL factors, verify EMA20 updates on each bar close
Subscribe to AAPL factors, verify TradeRate updates every 1s
Switch main chart timeframe, factor chart auto-syncs
Unsubscribe AAPL, subscribe TSLA, verify no AAPL updates received
Check browser DevTools WebSocket messages for factor_update
BarBuilder with watermark-based close and late-arrival window
ReplayClock with Redis heartbeat for cross-machine sync
Multi-machine SSH deployment configured in config.yaml
Populate domain/market/ with Tick, Bar, Snapshot models
Populate domain/order/ with Order, Fill, Contract models
Populate domain/strategy/ with Signal, Risk models
Populate domain/factor/ with Factor value objects
FactorEngine Python implementation (hybrid bar + tick based)
Real-time risk management engine with position limits
Risk management rules and drawdown checks
Risk engine integration with order execution
Historical context model for breakout detection
Simulate market_snapshot replay using historical trade&quote bulk file
Fix factor real-time update moduleId mismatch bug
Factor chart sub-follower mode (sync timeframe with main chart)
Abstract all search boxes into unified component
Unify bar chart and factor chart styles
Decouple trades_backfill from timeframe switch events
Configurable timeframe switch and bootstrap computation
Strategy pre-locate orchestrator with auto-sequenced jumps
Pre-located tickers pipeline backtest visualization and validation
Redis-based RPC for cross-service tool calls
Agent core loop with tool dispatch
Basic CLI tools and skills instruction
News engine output from log to JSON log
config_builder.py merge with config.py in platform/config/
Frontend chart timespan switch: newest bar covers last bar's open/high/low
